question: For the production of a batch of 100 products, the following are known: the setup time of the manufacturing system is 15 minutes, and the actual manufacturing time of the whole batch is 200 minutes. After how long will a batch of 5 products be ready?

options.E: insufficient data to determine the completion time of the batch of products
